race.comment: SIMONE'S CHOICE (9) finished out of the money two starts back then she settled well back and was beaten seventh over 1000m at Narrandera two weeks ago. Has her share of talent. Hard to beat in this suitable race. BIFURCATION (2) was out of the money two runs back then again missed the frame last start when she was never in contention finishing fourth over 1000m at Albury. Perfectly placed and is sure to take a ton of beating. DO YA HEAD IN (3) was safely held when ninth last start over 1200m at Goulburn, after a good first-up win at Queanbeyan. In the mix. RAIN QUEEN (7) returns and looks best of the rest.
